title: Kernel panic - not syncing: Attepmted to kill init! (Fedora 10)
description:
Created attachment 21839 [details]
Panic screen photo

Cannot boot Fedora 10 using this and newer kernel versions. Last kernel version working is 2.6.27.5. I have no idea what should I try to make it work....
